name: gmail_reply
description: Reply to an existing email thread. Automatically addresses the reply to the original sender and prefixes 'Re:' to the subject.

message_id.description: Original message ID to reply to

thread_id.description: Thread ID from the original message

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.
